mapper.sql: id, demand_no, publisher_id, title, summary, detail, category_id, category, budget_min, budget_max, expected_days, delivery_type, attachments_json, contact_note, quote_count, review_status, status, publish_at, closed_at, reject_reason, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `demand` ( demand_no, publisher_id, title, summary, detail, category_id, category, budget_min, budget_max, expected_days, delivery_type, attachments_json, contact_note, quote_count, review_status, status, publish_at, closed_at, reject_reason, version, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{demandNo}, #{publisherId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{detail}, #{categoryId}, #{category}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}, #{expectedDays}, #{deliveryType}, #{attachmentsJson}, #{contactNote}, #{quoteCount}, #{reviewStatus}, #{status}, #{publishAt}, #{closedAt}, #{rejectReason}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from `demand` where publisher_id = #{publisherId} order by id desc
select from `demand` where review_status = 1 and status in (2, 3) order by publish_at desc, id desc
select count(1) from `demand` where review_status = 1 and status in (2, 3)
mapper.update: update `demand` set review_status = #{reviewStatus}, status = #{status}, publish_at = #{publishAt}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `demand` set quote_count = quote_count + 1, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `demand` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `demand` set category = #{category}, updated_at = now() where category_id = #{categoryId}
